nodes.label: AI as gap-filler for missing data
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for core expertise
nodes.grounding_span: help bridge the gap in estimation between what is recorded in databases/literature vs. what could help with estimation

nodes.label: AI as comprehensive method generator
nodes.grounding_span: I have received helpful methods of estimating based on the functional group(s) of the unknown molecule

nodes.label: AI as knowledge refresher for unfamiliar topics
nodes.label_negative: AI as deep analysis tool for core expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI tools give me quick recaps or summaries of terms or methods when I am either unfamiliar or rusty on the topic

nodes.label: AI as literature discovery tool
nodes.grounding_span: it would be helpful for AI tools to use literature based results for estimation as opposed to numerical estimations

nodes.label: Historical accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: even if the estimations are horribly off, the overall CO2eq scores should still be within reason

nodes.label: Efficient knowledge discovery
nodes.grounding_span: quick recaps or summaries of terms or methods when I am either unfamiliar or rusty on the topic

nodes.label: Empirical grounding in research
nodes.grounding_span: it would be much simpler if it first decided to scan literature sources to see if there are tabulated literature records

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as a tool
nodes.grounding_span: It is helpful to have estimations of these for internal and sometimes external reporting

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's assumption of expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I have not had the need to use them for frameworks for deep AI analysis

nodes.label: Desire for AI to prioritize literature over computation
nodes.grounding_span: it would be much simpler if it first decided to scan literature sources

nodes.label: Rationalization and team validation
nodes.grounding_span: I do however rationalize whether the results are reasonable and confirm it with my team as well

nodes.label: Preference for empirical literature over computation
nodes.grounding_span: it would be much simpler if it first decided to scan literature sources
